title: Nidularium concentricum
taxonomy: Nidularium concentricum is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family, Bromeliaceae. It is native to Brazil and belongs to the genus Nidularium, which consists of epiphytic plants. The classification of Nidularium concentricum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Poales. This species is also known to be part of the subfamily Tillandsioideae. The correct classification is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, class - Liliopsida, order - Poales, family - Bromeliaceae, subfamily - Tillandsioideae, tribe - Tillandsieae, genus - Nidularium, species - Nidularium concentricum.
